title: Dumped verilog with -P option gives default to all case expressions.
code_blocks:
1 module test (
  2         clk
  3         );
  4
  5 input clk;
  6
  7 reg a;
  8
  9 always @ (posedge clk) begin
 10     case (a)
 11         0:
 12             begin
 13                 a <= 1;
 14             end
 15         1:
 16             begin
 17                 a <= 0;
 18             end
 19         default:
 20             begin
 21                 a <= 0;
 22             end
 23     endcase
 24 end
 25
 26 endmodule

1 PFORM DUMP NATURES:
  2 PFORM DUMP DISCIPLINES:
  3 PFORM DUMP COMPILATION UNITS:
  4 package $unit
  5 endpackage
  6 PFORM DUMP PACKAGES:
  7 PFORM DUMP MODULES:
  8 module test;
  9     .clk(clk)
 10     reg logic scalar set_data_type_=13vector_type_t net<scalar> a;
 11         vector of logic
 12     wire /*implicit*/ input <no_type> scalar port<scalar> clk;
 13     always /* case.v:9 */
 14       @(posedge clk)
 15         begin
 16           case (a) /* case.v:10 */
 17             default:
 18                 begin
 19                   a <= 'sd1;  /* case.v:13 */
 20                 end
 21             default:
 22                 begin
 23                   a <= 'sd0;  /* case.v:17 */
 24                 end
 25             0:
 26                 begin
 27                   a <= 'sd0;  /* case.v:21 */
 28                 end
 29           endcase
 30         end
 31 endmodule
 32 PFORM DUMP PRIMITIVES:

1 PFORM DUMP NATURES:
  2 PFORM DUMP DISCIPLINES:
  3 PFORM DUMP COMPILATION UNITS:
  4 package $unit
  5 endpackage
  6 PFORM DUMP PACKAGES:
  7 PFORM DUMP MODULES:
  8 module test;
  9     .clk(clk)
 10     reg logic scalar set_data_type_=13vector_type_t net<scalar> a;
 11         vector of logic
 12     wire /*implicit*/ input <no_type> scalar port<scalar> clk;
 13     always /* case.v:9 */
 14       @(posedge clk)
 15         begin
 16           case (a) /* case.v:10 */
 17             'sd0:
 18                 begin
 19                   a <= 'sd1;  /* case.v:13 */
 20                 end
 21             'sd1:
 22                 begin
 23                   a <= 'sd0;  /* case.v:17 */
 24                 end
 25             default:
 26                 begin
 27                   a <= 'sd0;  /* case.v:21 */
 28                 end
 29           endcase
 30         end
 31 endmodule
 32 PFORM DUMP PRIMITIVES:
